targets.name: blog, child articles, and child comments are absent after blogDelete

notes: Live 2025-01 capture creates a disposable blog with two articles and one REST-created comment per article, records the pre-delete blog/article/comment graph as the parity cassette, deletes the blog through Admin GraphQL, then proves blog(id:), article(id:), filtered articles(first:), and filtered comments(first:) no longer expose cascaded children. The direct comment(id:) branch remains runtime-test-backed because the public Admin API returned a known internal-error response for missing comments after delete instead of a stable null payload. Proxy replay hydrates the existing upstream blog graph through the cassette before staging the supported blogDelete locally.
